prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-17OZCOFFEEMUGS-PARENT-AMZ Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 17oz Modern Stoneware Terracotta Coffee Mugs Farmhouse Decor Kitchen Essentails (4 Colors) Description: Bring a touch of natural warmth, organic design and farmhouse decor to any kitchen, with our 17oz stoneware mugs, featuring a terracotta base and smooth, glazed upper. Thoughtfully designed to blend earthy texture with modern simplicity, these coffee mug perfectly balance function and form.

Each mug is made from durable stoneware, giving it a solid, comfortable weight in hand while maintaining a refined silhouette that complements any kitchen aesthetic. The un-glazed terracotta base adds a natural contrast and tactile finish, grounding the piece in organic style. The smooth, glazed upper not only provides a sleek look but also ensures that each sip from hot coffee and herbal tea to cocoa or matcha—is perfectly enjoyed without lingering stains or residue.

Designed for everyday convenience, these mugs are microwave and dishwasher safe, making them as practical as they are beautiful. Their 17 ounce capacity offers the perfect size for generous pours of your favorite hot or cold beverages, whether you’re brewing your first cup in the morning or winding down with tea in the evening. Available in four modern colorways, each mug brings a curated, collected feel to your table or open shelving, inviting you to mix and match for a warm, lived in look.

Perfect for home use, at the office, cabin or cottage, or as a thoughtful gift for coffee and tea lovers alike, Beille's terracotta based stoneware mugs are a must have staple that elevates daily rituals, one sip at a time.

Weight: 0.96lbs Search Terms: Coffee mugs; tea cup; kitchen essentials; home and kitchen; housewarming gifts new home; wedding gifts; wedding registry must haves; espresso cups; stoneware coffee mugs; terracotta decor; large coffee mug; drinkware; mug set; farmhouse décor Features: - COFFEE MUGS: Crafted with a glossy stoneware upper and matte terracotta base, each mug combines warmth and simplicity; the blend of materials creates a balanced, tactile drinking experience, one that feels both modern and handcrafted, perfect for any kitchen - 17OZ CAPACITY: Designed for slow mornings and cozy afternoons, the 17 ounce size offers an ideal pour for coffee, tea, matcha, cocoa, lattes and more, comfortably holding your favorite drink without feeling too oversized - 4 SOFT & NEUTRAL COLORS: Available in four naturally inspired hues, each mug complements a range of kitchen palettes from warm neutrals to cool minimal tones—inviting easy mixing and matching - DISHWASHER & MICROWAVE SAFE: Durable stoneware construction ensures lasting quality, while microwave and dishwasher safe materials make daily use easy and effortless from start to finish - THOUGHTFUL GIFTING: Beautifully designed for everyday living, these mugs make a thoughtful gift for coffee and tea lovers, hosts or hostesses, housewarmings, birthdays and more === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 4-Pack 17oz Modern Stoneware Terracotta Coffee Mugs

anthropic.title_differentiation: Set Of 4, Farmhouse Decor, Dishwasher And Microwave Safe, Glazed And Matte Finish, 4 Neutral Colors

openai.title_differentiation: Stoneware, Terracotta Base, 17Oz Capacity, Microwave And Dishwasher Safe, 4 Soft Neutral Colors, Gift Ready
